seo_title: Taurus February 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
h1: Taurus February 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
meta_description: Taurus February 2026 horoscope: Saturn enters Aries (your 12th), the Aquarius solar eclipse in your 10th, and the Leo full moon in your 4th. Key dates, love, career, and Black Tourmaline as crystal of the month.
energy_theme: Private restructuring beneath a public rise
key_dates_overview: Feb 1 — Full Moon in Leo (4th house)
Feb 17 — New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius (10th house)
Feb 26 — Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces (11th house)
affirmation: I clear the unseen so the visible can stand.
content:
This Month's Energy

Taurus, February 2026 places you in a paradox: the Aquarius solar eclipse on Feb 17 catapults your 10th house of career and public role into the spotlight, while Saturn's arrival in Aries (Feb 13-14) opens a 2.5-year cycle in your 12th house of rest, closure, and unseen foundations. The Leo full moon on Feb 1 already lit up your 4th house of home and family — a storyline that peaks just before the structural shifts begin. This is private restructuring beneath a public rise. The world will ask more of you this month; your deeper work is to clear what nobody sees.

Key Dates

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Taurus | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|------------------|------------| | Feb 1 | Full Moon in Leo (Snow Moon) | A home, family, or living-space matter peaks in your 4th house | Do: complete a domestic decision / Avoid: re-opening a settled conflict | | Feb 13-14 | Saturn enters Aries | A 2.5-year cycle of inner clearing begins in your 12th house | Do: name one habit to release / Avoid: ignoring exhaustion | | Feb 17 | New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius 28°04' | Career eclipse in your 10th house rewrites your public role | Do: claim the title or direction / Avoid: announcing it before April | | Feb 17-20 | Saturn-Neptune conjunction at Aries 0° | Structure meets dream in your 12th house — a hidden matter needs both | Do: seek counsel, therapy, or a private practice / Avoid: isolating | | Feb 26 | Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces | Your 11th house of networks slows — friendships re-review | Do: revisit old collaborators / Avoid: launching group ventures | | Feb 28 | Six-planet alignment | A rare line-up stabilizes whatever you've quietly chosen | Do: write your next 6-month plan / Avoid: comparison scrolling |

Career & Money

This is the month your professional direction becomes visible — but the foundation is being relaid in private. The Feb 17 eclipse in your 10th house can hand you a title, a platform, or a public-facing role you've worked years toward. Saturn entering your 12th the same week, however, asks what hidden drain (a depleted routine, an unfinished closure, an energetic leak) has been silently capping your output. Uranus remains in your sign, so the unconventional choice remains the right one. Money: steady, but watch a delayed payment or contract revision near Feb 26. Long-term wealth-building tools live at /crystals-for-wealth/. Uranus in your sign all year keeps the unconventional choice correct — a digital pivot, a niche specialization, or a rebrand that your more conservative instincts would normally resist. The Feb 17 eclipse in your 10th house is the public-facing version of this: the role or direction you've privately incubated becomes visible, sometimes before you feel ready. Trust the timing. Saturn in your 12th from Feb 13 also reveals what has been silently capping your output — a draining client, an unfinished closure, an old story about your worth. Clearing it now is the highest-leverage career work you can do this quarter. Money is steady rather than spectacular in February; the bigger shift is in direction and in what you say no to. For Taurus, the no is the work.

Love & Relationships

Venus, your ruling planet, spends most of February in Capricorn (your 9th house) and enters Aquarius on the eclipse. Love in February 2026 is vision-tinged and values-led: you're attracted to people who share your long-term worldview, not just your weekend plans. The Leo full moon on Feb 1 settles a family or home matter — possibly a conversation with a parent, sibling, or live-in partner that has been building since November. If single, the eclipse window (Feb 14-20) can introduce someone through a professional context — but Saturn's 12th-house entry means do not ignore red flags you'd usually excuse. For stones traditionally associated with love and emotional balance, see /crystals-for-love/ and /crystals-for-anxiety/. If partnered, the eclipse in your 10th can make your relationship more visible — a couple's brand, a public-facing project together, or simply a phase where others project onto your partnership. Taurus tends to keep love private; this month asks for graceful visibility. Saturn in your 12th from Feb 13 also means: any unprocessed relationship history will surface now. Old griefs, unspoken resentments, or patterns you've absorbed from past partners want release. Therapy, journaling, or honest conversations with a trusted friend are well-supported. For singles, the Saturn-Neptune conjunction suggests looking beneath what looks good on paper. The person who feels grounding beneath the surface will outlast the one who only looks the part.

Health & Wellness

Saturn in your 12th house for the next 2.5 years makes rest a structural requirement, not a luxury. Sleep debt, unprocessed grief, and silent stress all become louder now — and that's the point. February's lifestyle cue is to clear the invisible: a digital fast, a therapy appointment, a commitment to non-negotiable downtime. The Feb 1 Leo full moon supports a home reset — fresh sheets, decluttered bedroom, calmer evenings. Black Tourmaline is traditionally used as a grounding practice during energetic clearing; it is not a medical intervention.

Crystal of the Month

Black Tourmaline — the deeper grounder — is Taurus' crystal for February 2026. Why this crystal fits Taurus this month. Saturn entering your 12th house is the most quietly demanding transit of the decade — it asks you to look at what you've buried, while the 10th-house eclipse demands public presence. You need a stone traditionally associated with grounding, protection, and the release of dense energy. As an earth sign you already anchor well, but Black Tourmaline's specialty is transforming rather than absorbing — exactly the skill the 12th house teaches. How to use it during February. Place a piece between your bedframe and the wall from Feb 13 onward to support 12th-house rest. Carry it during the Feb 17 eclipse if you must be visible while privately processing. Hold it for three slow breaths before answering difficult emails. Best date to use it. February 13-14, the Saturn ingress — set the stone at your bedside with one sentence: what I am ready to release. Read more. Full Black Tourmaline meaning guide and the Taurus crystals collection. For Taurus, the body matters — you process energy somatically, not just mentally. Black Tourmaline's weight in your hand is part of its medicine for your sign; choose a palm stone or worry stone rather than a tiny chip. Earth-sign compatibility also makes Black Tourmaline a natural pair with your traditional allies (Emerald, Rose Quartz, or Pyrite). On Feb 1 (Leo full moon, your 4th house), place the stone at the center of your home for 24 hours to absorb any family-system static before the Saturn ingress. From Feb 26 onward, hold it for three breaths before opening email — Mercury Rx in your 11th house of networks can stir delayed-message anxiety, and your nervous system benefits from the pause.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

The 12th-House Clearing Ritual — February 13 or 14 1. Cleanse. Place your Black Tourmaline in a bowl of dry sea salt overnight on Feb 12 (the eve of Saturn's ingress). 2. Intention. Saturn's 12th-house work is about release. Write a list of everything you've carried silently for the past 2.5 years — grudges, griefs, obligations that aren't yours. 3. Action. Place the Black Tourmaline on top of the list and put both in a drawer you don't open daily. This is not destruction; it is a sealed container for processing. 4. Reflection. On the Feb 28 six-planet alignment, take the list out and burn or shred it (safely). Keep the stone. The container has done its work.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Taurus crystal guide for stones connected with abundance, grounding, love, and energetic protection — curated for your earth-sign nature and the Saturn-in-Aries cycle ahead.

FAQ

Is February 2026 a good month for Taurus? Professionally, yes — the Feb 17 eclipse can elevate your public role. Privately, demanding: Saturn in your 12th house begins a 2.5-year clearing cycle. Both can be true; protect your rest. How will Saturn entering Aries affect Taurus? It enters your 12th house of rest, closure, and the unconscious. Expect to revisit old patterns, release what's complete, and rebuild your inner foundation. The first month sets the tone. How will the February 17 solar eclipse affect Taurus? In your 10th house of career, this eclipse can shift your title, direction, or public visibility. Set the intention on Feb 17; refine after Mercury retrograde clears in March. What is the best crystal for Taurus in February 2026? Black Tourmaline, for grounding during the 12th-house Saturn work. Alternatives: Smoky Quartz for gentle release, Clear Quartz for clarity. Full collection: Taurus crystals. Will Mercury retrograde affect Taurus money? Mercury retrograde in your 11th house (Feb 26) can delay group payments or collaborations. Revisit old allies; don't sign new contracts until late March.
